category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Cape Verde.

title.en: China-to-Cape Verde EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入佛得角：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入維德角：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Cape Verde IGQPI standards, ARME electricity-sector regulation, ELECTRA grid-interface expectations, IEC 61851 / IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 charging practice, IEC 61000 EMC evidence, coastal island derating, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与佛得角IGQPI标准、ARME电力部门监管、ELECTRA电网接口预期、IEC 61851 / IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2充电实践、IEC 61000 EMC证据、沿海岛屿降额要求，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與維德角IGQPI標準、ARME電力部門監管、ELECTRA電網接口預期、IEC 61851 / IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2充電實務、IEC 61000 EMC證據、沿海島嶼降額要求，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Cape Verde, the practical gaps are IEC/EU-style documentation rather than China-only GB/T evidence, Type 2 / CCS2 connector compatibility instead of GB/T 20234, 230/400 V 50 Hz grid ratings rather than China's 220/380 V 50 Hz baseline, IEC 61851 safety evidence, IEC 61000 EMC evidence, and island/coastal derating for salt mist, heat, wind-blown dust, logistics, and maintenance. Cape Verde's EV market is nascent, so project specifications from IGQPI, ARME, ELECTRA, public tenders, importers, and site owners should be confirmed before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入佛得角时，实务差距主要包括：需要IEC/欧式文件体系而非仅中国GB/T证据；接口须适配Type 2 / CCS2而非GB/T 20234；电网额定值为230/400 V 50 Hz而非中国220/380 V 50 Hz基线；需准备IEC 61851安全证据、IEC 61000 EMC证据，并针对盐雾、热、风沙、岛屿物流和维护进行降额。佛得角电动汽车市场仍处早期，出货前应向IGQPI、ARME、ELECTRA、公共招标方、进口商和场地方确认项目规范。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入維德角時，實務差距主要包括：需要IEC/歐式文件體系而非僅中國GB/T證據；接口須適配Type 2 / CCS2而非GB/T 20234；電網額定值為230/400 V 50 Hz而非中國220/380 V 50 Hz基線；需準備IEC 61851安全證據、IEC 61000 EMC證據，並針對鹽霧、熱、風沙、島嶼物流和維護進行降額。維德角電動汽車市場仍處早期，出貨前應向IGQPI、ARME、ELECTRA、公共招標方、進口商和場地方確認項目規範。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, IGQPI scope determination, ARME approval, ELECTRA grid-connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Cape Verde standards, electricity-sector rules, IEC editions, project specifications, and installation requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、IGQPI适用范围裁定、ARME批准、ELECTRA并网批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行佛得角标准、电力部门规则、IEC版本、项目规范和安装要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、IGQPI適用範圍裁定、ARME批准、ELECTRA併網批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行維德角標準、電力部門規則、IEC版本、項目規範和安裝要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
